title: M13
subtitle: Great Hercules Cluster
notes: A bright globular cluster and one of the first showcase targets for CuzBro Observatory.
nextGoal: Capture again with longer exposure time and improved tracking.

title: Albireo
subtitle: Colorful double star
notes: A beautiful blue and gold double star and one of the best color contrast targets in the summer sky.
nextGoal: Capture a sharper version with better focus and steadier seeing.

title: Dumbbell Nebula
subtitle: M27 planetary nebula
notes: A classic planetary nebula target with a distinct dumbbell shape and a rewarding object for smartphone astrophotography.
nextGoal: Try again with a UHC filter and longer stacked exposures.

title: Ring Nebula
subtitle: M57 planetary nebula
notes: A small but iconic smoke-ring shaped planetary nebula near Vega.
nextGoal: Capture with higher magnification and improved focus.

title: Lagoon Nebula
subtitle: M8 emission nebula
notes: A bright summer nebula rich with glowing gas, star-forming regions, and dramatic structure.
nextGoal: Revisit from a darker sky with the UHC filter.

title: Moon
subtitle: Our closest neighbor
notes: A detailed lunar capture showing surface texture, craters, and contrast along the terminator.
nextGoal: Try video stacking for sharper lunar detail.
